ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "taxonomy" TEXT /* Taxonomic classification of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "genetic_code" TEXT /* Genetic code of the species */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the species entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the species entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compounds" (
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compound */,
  "compound_name" TEXT /* Name of the compound */,
  "smiles" TEXT /* SMILES representation of the compound's structure */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of compound (e.g., amino acid, nucleotide) */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the compound belongs to */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the compound */,
  "molecular_formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula of the compound */,
  "inchi" TEXT /* InChI representation of the compound */,
  "inchi_key" TEXT /* InChI key of the compound */,
  "iupac_name" TEXT /* IUPAC name of the compound */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the compound entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the compound entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compounds_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "from_compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound the interaction starts from */,
  "to_compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound the interaction ends at */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the interaction belongs to */,
  "network" TEXT /* Name of the metabolic network the interaction is part of */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., enzymatic, transport) */,
  "reaction_equation" TEXT /* Reaction equation for the interaction */,
  "enzyme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enzyme involved in the interaction (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_to_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_from_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the network */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the network */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the network belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the network entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the network entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the property value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound the annotation is about */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction the annotation is about */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound the permission is for */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction the permission is for */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, query, update) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the activity */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network the analysis was performed on */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., clustering, prediction) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was last updated */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_analysis_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network the visualization is for */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., graph, heatmap) */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image of the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound the prediction is for */,
  "predicted_compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predicted compound */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence of the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was last updated */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the machine learning model used for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)
